name: XRM Google Search Console Prep - Local
notes: Local workflow blueprint for future GSC integration. Uses sample rows until Google Search Console credential is added.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { source: 'sample-gsc', property: 'https://xrmglobalhk.com/', rows: [ { query: 'china procurement partner', page: '/', clicks: 0, impressions: 120, ctr: 0, position: 18.4 }, { query: 'hotel ffe procurement china', page: '/hotel-procurement', clicks: 0, impressions: 80, ctr: 0, position: 22.1 } ] } }];

const rows = $input.first().json.rows; const opportunities = rows.map(row => ({ ...row, opportunity: row.impressions > 50 && row.position >= 8 ? 'Create or improve content' : 'Monitor', recommended_action: row.ctr === 0 ? 'Improve title/meta and add internal links' : 'Review ranking page' })); return [{ json: { generated_by_ai: true, status: 'pending-review', workflow: 'google-search-console-prep-local', opportunities } }];

const item = $input.first().json; item.review_checklist = ['Connect readonly Google Search Console credential later', 'Verify property ownership manually', 'Do not change DNS while Cloudflare ticket is pending', 'Review suggested pages before drafting', 'Create drafts only']; return [{ json: item }];
